_meta.description: Highly customizable Python terminal progress bar with 6 named bar types. Some use color, some use Unicode, and the gradient type uses truecolor.

space.notes: Colored bar: background color provides the visual fill. Requires colored terminal.

plus_minus.notes: Default colors: green fill, red empty

gradient.notes: Color shifts from start_color to end_color. Requires truecolor terminal and Unicode support.
